zh.lifeSummary: 當Dafydd Ap Gruffyd於1238年7月11日出生在英國威爾斯尼德凱爾納方時，他的父親Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr43歲，母親Senana ferch Caradog40歲。他和Elizabeth de Ferrers至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1283年10月3日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利享年45歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dafydd Ap Gruffyd于1238年7月11日出生在英国威尔斯尼德凱爾納方时，他的父亲Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr43岁，母亲Senana ferch Caradog40岁。他和Elizabeth de Ferrers至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1283年10月3日在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利享年45岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

en.lifeSummary: When Dafydd Ap Gruffyd was born on 11 July 1238, in Caernarfon, Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr, was 43 and his mother, Senana ferch Caradog, was 40. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth de Ferrers. He died on 3 October 1283, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Llandrillo-yn-Rhos, Denbighshire, Wales: Llandrillo-yn-Rhos, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.Gwynedd, Caernarfon, Wales: Caernarfon, Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dafydd Ap Gruffyd est né le 11 juillet 1238, à Caernarfon, Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Senana ferch Caradog, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth de Ferrers. Il est décédé le 3 octobre 1283, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dafydd Ap Gruffyd am 11. Juli 1238 in Caernarfon, Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr 43 und seine Mutter Senana ferch Caradog 40. Er hatte mit Elizabeth de Ferrers mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Oktober 1283 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd Ap Gruffyd è nato il il 11 luglio 1238 nel Caernarfon, Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Senana ferch Caradog, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Elizabeth de Ferrers. Morì il 3 ottobre 1283, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Gruffydが1238年7月11日にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドケエルナルフォンで生まれた時，父Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawrは43歳，母Senana ferch Caradogは40歳であった。彼はElizabeth de Ferrersとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1283年10月3日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで45歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Gruffyd(이)가 1238년 7월 11일 영국 웨일스 그윈드 카이른아르폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Senana ferch Caradog(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Elizabeth de Ferrers(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1283년 10월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd Ap Gruffyd nasceu em 11 de julho de 1238, em Caernarfon, Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Senana ferch Caradog, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Elizabeth de Ferrers. Ele faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1283, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dafydd Ap Gruffyd родился 11 июля 1238 г. в местности каирнарфон, гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Senana ferch Caradog, 40. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Elizabeth de Ferrers. Он умер 3 октября 1283 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
